resourceTemplates.name: mailchimp-list-campaigns
resourceTemplates.title: Mailchimp list campaigns
resourceTemplates.description: Get all campaigns in a Mailchimp account. Optional parameters: fields, exclude_fields, count (default 10, max 1000), offset, type (regular|plaintext|absplit|rss|variate), status (save|paused|schedule|sending|sent), before_send_time, since_send_time, before_create_time, since_create_time, list_id, folder_id, member_id, sort_field (create_time|send_time), sort_dir (ASC|DESC), include_resend_shortcut_eligibility, and include_resend_shortcut_usage.

resourceTemplates.name: mailchimp-get-campaign
resourceTemplates.title: Mailchimp campaign info
resourceTemplates.description: Get information about a specific Mailchimp campaign by campaign_id. Optional parameters: fields, exclude_fields, include_resend_shortcut_eligibility, and include_resend_shortcut_usage.

resourceTemplates.name: mailchimp-get-campaign-content
resourceTemplates.title: Mailchimp campaign content
resourceTemplates.description: Get the HTML, plain-text, template, and archive content for a specific Mailchimp campaign by campaign_id. Optional parameters: fields and exclude_fields.

resourceTemplates.name: mailchimp-list-campaign-feedback
resourceTemplates.title: Mailchimp campaign feedback
resourceTemplates.description: List team feedback for a specific Mailchimp campaign by campaign_id. Optional parameters: fields and exclude_fields.

resourceTemplates.name: mailchimp-get-campaign-feedback-message
resourceTemplates.title: Mailchimp campaign feedback message
resourceTemplates.description: Get a specific feedback message from a specific Mailchimp campaign by campaign_id and feedback_id. Optional parameters: fields and exclude_fields.

resourceTemplates.name: mailchimp-get-campaign-send-checklist
resourceTemplates.title: Mailchimp campaign send checklist
resourceTemplates.description: Review the send checklist for a specific Mailchimp campaign by campaign_id before sending. Optional parameters: fields and exclude_fields.
